narrative:
Middletown Twp township has 2,233 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points.
